name: Emilia Development (O.F.G) Ltd.
summary: Emilia Development (O.F.G) Ltd. manages a portfolio of investments in the industrial services, distribution, and logistics sectors. The company produces and distributes chemical and raw materials to a range of industries; and markets and distributes liquid flow solutions for industrial piping, housing and construction, valves, fire protection, infrastructure, control and automation, pumps, plumbing, and sanitation products. It also provides logistics solutions, including warehousing and transportation; and produces various consumer personal care and cosmetic products private labels of international chain stores and brands. The company was founded in 1945 and is based in Ramat Gan, Israel.
